Title: Requires employers to pay employees accrued but unused vacation, paid time off, or other paid leave provided upon separation from employment
Summary: Requires employers to pay employees accrued but unused vacation, paid time off, or other paid leave provided upon termination, resignation, retirement or other separation from employment.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the labor law, in relation to requiring employers to pay employees accrued but unused vacation, paid time off, or other paid leave provided upon separation from employment
